overview.description: Self test for command: Assert equal and notEqual
overview.name: Assert general test

var.comment: Check new assert by inject expected result
var.name: BestTool

var.comment: Check new assert by inject expected result
var.name: name

notEqual.comment: Assert for check that 5 different contents is not equal

equal.comment: Assert for check that three contents is equal

assert.comment: Self test for Assert with few sub-command - notEqual and equal

notEqual.comment: Assert for check that 5 different contents is not equal

equal.comment: Assert for check that two contents is equal

notEqual.comment: Assert for check that contents from numbers is not equal

equal.comment: Assert for check that two contents from numbers is equal

notEqual.comment: Assert for check that contents from symbols is not equal

equal.comment: Assert for check that two contents from symbols is equal

notEqual.comment: Assert for check that contents from variable is not equal

equal.comment: Assert for check that two contents from variable is equal
